name: ghoztty-claude-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin for controlling Ghoztty terminal windows and panes via CLI

plugins.name: ghoztty
plugins.description: Control Ghoztty terminal windows and panes from Claude Code — open windows, create split layouts, read pane output, send keystrokes, and manage layouts via CLI — plus a live per-pane status banner that tracks the session's task, status, and PR
